summary: A rollout page where the phase overview is the clear hero and the workstream lanes sit below as secondary execution support.
composition_pattern: large named phases across the top with compact aligned lanes below and only light gate logic between phases
support_structure: compact workstream lanes below the phase band
short secondary action blocks within each phase
light checkpoint cues only when needed
when_to_use: The slide must first communicate one source-derived phase overview as the main execution story.
The workstream detail should support the phase overview rather than compete with it.
avoid_when: The slide is primarily about hard gate logic or governance control rather than phase-led rollout.
